warnings.message: fastq_dir, img_dir, metadata_dir are CWL Directory or Directory[] inputs; Galaxy needs a collection or wrapper-side directory handling strategy.
fastqc step scatters over fastq_dir (dotproduct) — Galaxy will need a per-element collection mapping or an in-tool loop.
salmon_quantification calls a nested Workflow (#salmon-quantification.cwl, 9 inner steps including its own scatter over fastq_dir); downstream Galaxy may flatten or wrap.
Several outputs are File? (spatial_plot, scvelo_*, squidpy_*); downstream Galaxy template must allow conditional/optional outputs.
No CWL job file or sibling test inputs discoverable in repo at root; tests=[] emitted.
